summary:
Claim: On average, about 4–6 muscle fibers are attached to a single Golgi tendon organ (GTO).  
Evidence: - GTOs monitor muscle tension by sensing stretch-induced force in parallel elastic elements. - They trigger reflexive inhibition when excessive tension is detected to protect against injury.  
Answer: D
